message:
beads: file qeapt — /rpc/connectors/{id}/artifact GET leaks provenance

Pass-2 mock/stub scan on fcp-host + fcp-sdk surfaced one real finding:
the artifact-metadata GET handler is registered outside `protected_routes`
and returns the full supply-chain surface (binary hash, signature, key_id,
trust_root, builder_id, SBOM) to unauthenticated callers. The existing
`TODO(review)` comment at fcp-host.rs:2462 already flagged this but no
issue was tracked. See flywheel_connectors-qeapt for details + fix.

No other actionable findings: the ~100 raw grep hits were either test-
module fixtures, documented architectural fallbacks (empty zone-policy
map), rejection enums (ArtifactRejectionKind::DemoBundle — the defense,
not a stub), or historical comments describing prior synthetic behavior
that has since been removed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
